LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TOAN XA, SMARTE CARTE INC. A MINNESOTA CORPORATION DOING MOTION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT WILL SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER BUT CHANGES IT TO REQUIRE DEFENDANTS TO FILE AND SERVE THEIR ANSWERS BY JANUARY 30, 2019. THE COURT DOES NOT DEEM PLEADINGS FILED. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

Motion For Order To Set Aside Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Jan-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TOAN XA, SMARTE CARTE INC. A MINNESOTA CORPORATION DOING Motion For Order To Set Aside Entry Of Default

Defendants' motion to set aside default is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The court will sign the proposed order but changes it to require defendants to file and serve their answers by January 30, 2019. The court does not deem pleadings filed. Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
